programme.title: Teletubbies (Classic)
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and makes quacking sounds, which Dipsy finds very amusing. He joins the other Teletubbies to watch two children feeding some ducks. In Teletubbyland, Little Bo Peep has lost her sheep.

programme.title: Teletubbies Classic
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch as Andy Brown shows some children how butterflies are. The Teletubbies love flying their kites and a strong wind blows Po all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies (Classic)
programme.desc: All four Teletubbies go under the slide. The Teletubbies watch some children go over a stile, under some trees and through a gate. When Laa-Laa goes for walk, Tinky Winky and Dipsy secretly follow her.

programme.title: Teletubbies Classic
programme.desc: A balloon appears in Teletubbyland; it floats in the air. The Teletubbies follow the balloon all over Teletubbyland, but they can't catch it.

programme.title: Teletubbies (Classic)
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the Naughty Pig. Dipsy's hat keeps blowing away and he has to chase it all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies (Classic)
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa run into Home Hill to say 'Eh-oh', but where 's Po? Some children help their dad to wash his car. They get very wet and soapy.

programme.title: Teletubbies (Classic)
programme.desc: The Tubbies crawl through the arch in Home Hill and watch Alex Pascall and some children sing 'Handy Hands'.

programme.title: Teletubbies (Classic)
programme.desc: It's time for the Teletubbies to do their exercises. A voice trumpet rises and the Teletubbies stretch up and down to it's instructions.

programme.title: Teletubbies (Classic)
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number two. Dipsy and Laa-Laa are eating Tubby Toast. They play the game 'Two Little Teletubbies', but while they are playing the Noo-Noo tidies up their Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies (Classic)
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take turns to stand on a hill, in front of the house, next to a tree under a cloud. Andy Brown and some children visit some giraffes. The animals march through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies (Classic)
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are eating Tubby Toast. They stop to watch Amy making pasta. A ball of string appears in Teletubbyland. Po knocks the string in to the air with her scooter and it makes a stringy mess all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies (Classic)
programme.desc: Tinky Winky calls the other Tubbies to come and watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story about the naughty sock. The Tubby Toast machine makes a tower of tubby toast.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: 47 Years ... Are We Sisters?; DNA & Unlock: Decade of Deception?
programme.desc: Kelly was adopted as a child and, while searching for her birth family, came across a woman who could be her biological sister; Sadie says that her boyfriend, Todd, has cheated on her, and he doubts the paternity of their 2-year-old son.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock My Sister's Man's Phone; My Dad Is Not Your Dad
programme.desc: Luvly and Tori are on a mission to break up their sister Chanti's toxic relationship with Robert, whom they call a pathological cheater; Keisha believes that Quitiza is lying about being her half-sister.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlocking the Phone After Dating 1 Month?; Dad, Are You Embarrassed of Me?
programme.desc: Joneisha fears that the man she loves is a pathological liar and says he randomly disappears; Jamyah had a child when she was just 14, and her father feels like a failure because of it.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: 21-Year-Old DNA Mystery; Unlock My Three Phones
programme.desc: Amber learned about her potential father's identity when she turned 16, and Karamo hopes to put her search to a halt with a paternity test; Bernadette is fed up with her girlfriend's incessant accusations of flirting and sleeping with men.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: You Posted Sex With Your Ex?; DNA: Are You Really My Mom?
programme.desc: Jasmine's son was only a month old when her boyfriend left her to hook up with his ex; Jose believes his entire life was a lie and that he was adopted, while Maria swears that she brought Jose into the world and has taken a DNA test to prove it.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Three Sisters in Crisis; Unlock: If You Aren't Cheating, Then Who Is She?
programme.desc: Sisters Jazmine, Jenny and Janey hope they can repair the scar tissue from some very deep wounds; Rani is livid and can't seem to get the image of her boyfriend, Chris, with another woman out of her mind.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: Stop Denying Your Daughter!; Unlock: I Can Smell the Cheating
programme.desc: Lizzy says that every time she breaks up with her boyfriend, Heem, he denies being the father of her daughter; accused of infidelity, Dennis says he suspects that girlfriend Deedee is cheating with her brother.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: Messy Family Drama; Unlock the Truth: Did You Steal My Money?
programme.desc: Markeila says that, while she was pregnant, Darrell relocated to another state and had a child with another woman; Chloe says her Aunt Sabrena is a thief who stole her food stamp card and kept donations that were to be used for her mother's funeral.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA Mystery: Was My Dead Mother Right?; Toxic Grandma?
programme.desc: Marshall and his wife find out if he has a daughter; Keonie is fed up with being fat-shamed and controlled by his verbally abusive grandmother, who says that she's always had his back and did everything she could to raise him.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA Mystery: Was My Dead Mother Right?; Toxic Grandma?
programme.desc: Marshall and his wife find out if he has a daughter; Keonie is fed up with being fat-shamed and controlled by his verbally abusive grandmother, who says that she's always had his back and did everything she could to raise him.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: If You Want More Kids ... I Want a Ring; Unlock: 21-Year Marriage on the Rocks
programme.desc: Taniah wants her three children's father to propose to her; Penny believes that her sister, Tracey, is married to a no-good cheater.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Mom Calls Me Pure Evil; Before We Get Married, Is He My Son?
programme.desc: Mia confronts her mother, Gwennie, regarding the 17 years of abuse she's endured; Caleb questions whether he's the father of his fiancée Mahogany's child after seeing footage of another man driving his car with Mahogany.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Mom, Why?; Unlock the Phone: Stop Cheating
programme.desc: Kwane confronts her mother about the bad decisions she made; Brittany is fed up with her boyfriend, Dylan, being manipulative and controlling, and she no longer trusts him.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Help, My Daughter Has a Shopping Addiction; My Chosen Father Rejected Me; Unlock the Phone: Enough Lies!
programme.desc: Lisa fears that her daughter is in denial regarding her shopping addiction; Brooklyn and her friend Kevyn ended their familial relationship badly; Oladean says his wife left him once he revealed he was sick with cancer, but she says he is a fraud.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA Mystery: Are You My Cousin or My Father?; Update: Step Up and Take Care of Your Daughter!
programme.desc: At first, Neshay thought Michael was her cousin, but it turns out that he may be her father: Karamo tries to end a 29-year-old riddle; Kyla and Josh return with a wonderful update.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: Even if You're My Sister, I Hate You
programme.desc: A man named Lapolean could potentially be Davionne's father, but his other daughter doesn't believe that Davionne is her sister and has no desire to form a connection with her.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Couple in Crisis: You Won't Touch Me; Unlock: Is My Daughter's Girlfriend the Problem?
